findings.location: OCR body text — congestion term; output/pages/page_481.md § [JP] ### 幅輳
findings.trace: OCR reads 「幅帳」 in the OCR .md; the structured/translated pipeline corrected partially to 「幅輳」 but still wrong — correct kanji is 「輻輳」 (ふくそう, network congestion). 「幅」(width) ≠ 「輻」(spoke of a wheel). The wrong kanji propagated into output/pages/page_481.md as the section heading 「### 幅輳」 and into translated/page_481.json surface.jp = 「幅輳」. This is a HIGH-severity defect: the term name is visibly wrong and a learner looking up 「輻輳」 would not find this entry.
findings.recommended_fix: Fix term surface.jp from 「幅輳」 to 「輻輳」 in translated/page_481.json and regenerate output/pages/page_481.md. Also correct OCR source 「幅帳」 annotation.

findings.location: OCR body — callout box at bottom of page
findings.trace: The stylized callout box text was OCR-read as 「試験にはつしか出る！」 — 「コレ」 misread as 「つし」 (known コレ→つし pattern from prior rounds). This callout is not carried into the output page (callout content is summarised in the bullet points), so release impact is nil for the output file.
findings.recommended_fix: Correct OCR callout reading to 「試験にはコレが出る！」. Not release-impacting as content is not in output.
